title: OEE & Downtime Calculator
description: Calculates Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) based on Availability, Performance, and Quality, with detailed downtime loss analysis and actionable improvement suggestions. Compliant with ISO 22400, Lean Manufacturing, and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Planned Production Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total scheduled time for production in a shift/day (e.g., 8 hours = 480 minutes).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total scheduled time for production in a shift/day (e.g., 8 hours = 480 minutes).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir vardiya/günde planlanan toplam üretim süresi (ör. 8 saat = 480 dakika).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Produktionszeit pro Schicht/Tag (z.B. 8 Stunden = 480 Minuten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps total planifié pour la production par poste/jour (ex. 8 heures = 480 minutes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total programado para producción en un turno/día (ej., 8 horas = 480 minutos).

inputs.label: Total Downtime (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all unplanned and planned stops (breakdowns, setup, maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all unplanned and planned stops (breakdowns, setup, maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm plansız ve planlı duruşların toplamı (arıza, kurulum, bakım).
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller ungeplanten und geplanten Stopps (Störungen, Rüsten, Wartung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les arrêts non planifiés et planifiés (pannes, réglages, maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todas las paradas no planificadas y planificadas (averías, preparación, mantenimiento).

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time (minutes per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical fastest time to produce one unit under optimal conditions.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de cycle idéal (minutes par unité)
label_i18n.es: Tiempo de ciclo ideal (minutos por unidad)

businessContext_i18n.en: Theoretical fastest time to produce one unit under optimal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimum koşullarda bir birim üretmek için teorik en hızlı süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Theoretisch schnellste Zeit, um eine Einheit unter optimalen Bedingungen zu produzieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps théorique le plus rapide pour produire une unité dans des conditions optimales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo teórico más rápido para producir una unidad en condiciones óptimas.

inputs.label: Total Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total count of units produced during the planned production time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of units produced during the planned production time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan üretim süresi boyunca üretilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der während der geplanten Produktionszeit hergestellten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites pendant le temps de production planifié.
businessContext_i18n.es: Recuento total de unidades producidas durante el tiempo de producción planificado.

inputs.label: Defective Parts
inputs.businessContext: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite standartlarını karşılamayan birim sayısı (fire, yeniden işleme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die nicht den Qualitätsstandards entsprechen (Ausschuss, Nacharbeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités ne répondant pas aux normes de qualité (rebut, reprise).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades que no cumplen con los estándares de calidad (desperdicio, retrabajo).

inputs.label: Shift Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yorgunluk veya çevresel faktörleri ayarlamak için vardiya türü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schichttyp zur Anpassung an Ermüdung oder Umgebungsfaktoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de poste pour ajuster les facteurs de fatigue ou environnementaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de turno para ajustar por fatiga o factores ambientales.

inputs.label: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
inputs.businessContext: If true, small stops are counted as downtime per Six Sigma guidelines.

label_i18n.tr: Mikro-Duruşları (< 2 dk) Durma Süresine Dahil Et
label_i18n.fr: Inclure les micro-arrêts (< 2 min) dans le temps d'arrêt
label_i18n.es: Incluir microparadas (< 2 min) en el tiempo de inactividad

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, small stops are counted as downtime per Six Sigma guidelines.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, Altı Sigma yönergelerine göre küçük duruşlar durma süresi olarak sayılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, werden kleine Stopps gemäß Six Sigma-Richtlinien als Stillstand gezählt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, les petits arrêts sont comptés comme temps d'arrêt selon les directives Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, las paradas pequeñas se cuentan como tiempo de inactividad según las directrices de Seis Sigma.

rules.message: Downtime cannot exceed planned production time.
Defective parts must be less than or equal to total parts produced.
Ideal cycle time must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Quality below 99% – defect rate too high.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
